mapper.select: SELECT story_id, collect_id, title, creator, description, subject_keyword, source_title, content_url FROM tb_nlcf_story WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY story_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_nlcf_story_chunk ( story_id, chunk_no, chunk_text, token_count, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{storyId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkText}, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO tb_nlcf_story_embedding ( chunk_id, story_id, embedding_model, embedding_vector, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{chunkId}, #{storyId}, #{embeddingModel}, CAST(#{vectorJson} AS vector), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT c.chunk_id, c.story_id, c.chunk_no AS chunk_index, c.chunk_text, CAST(e.embedding_vector AS text) AS vector_json FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk c JOIN tb_nlcf_story_embedding e ON e.chunk_id = c.chunk_id ORDER BY c.chunk_id

SELECT chunk_id, story_id, chunk_no AS chunk_index, chunk_text FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk WHERE chunk_id IN
#{chunkId}

SELECT c.chunk_id, c.story_id, c.chunk_no AS chunk_index, c.chunk_text, CAST(e.embedding_vector AS text) AS vector_json FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk c JOIN tb_nlcf_story_embedding e ON e.chunk_id = c.chunk_id WHERE LOWER(c.chunk_text) LIKE CONCAT('title: ', LOWER(#{title}), '%') ORDER BY c.chunk_id

SELECT c.chunk_id, c.story_id, c.chunk_no AS chunk_index, c.chunk_text, CAST(e.embedding_vector AS text) AS vector_json FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk c JOIN tb_nlcf_story_embedding e ON e.chunk_id = c.chunk_id WHERE LOWER(c.chunk_text) LIKE CONCAT('%title: %', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ORDER BY c.chunk_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.chunk_id, c.story_id, c.chunk_no AS chunk_index, c.chunk_text, CAST(e.embedding_vector AS text) AS vector_json FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk c JOIN tb_nlcf_story_embedding e ON e.chunk_id = c.chunk_id WHERE LOWER(c.chunk_text) LIKE CONCAT('%description: %', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ORDER BY c.chunk_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.chunk_id, c.story_id, c.chunk_no AS chunk_index, c.chunk_text, CAST(e.embedding_vector AS text) AS vector_json FROM tb_nlcf_story_chunk c JOIN tb_nlcf_story_embedding e ON e.chunk_id = c.chunk_id ORDER BY c.chunk_id LIMIT #{limit}
